title: feat(mastracode): allow passing MCP server configs to createMastraCode
summary: Adds a `mcpServers` option to `MastraCodeConfig` so users can programmatically provide MCP server configurations when calling `createMastraCode()`. Programmatic servers are merged with file-based configs (from `.mastracode/mcp.json`, etc.) at highest priority, persist across `reload()` calls, and are still disabled by `disableMcp: true`. Changes span 4 files: config interface update in `index.ts`, merge logic in `mcp/manager.ts`, 4 new tests in `manager.test.ts`, and a well-written changeset.
maintainerNotes: Clean, well-scoped community contribution. Approved by abhiaiyer91. Author addressed CodeRabbit's nitpick by extracting the merge logic into a helper function. CI test jobs (Core, E2E, MCP, Memory, RAG, Combined stores) are stuck in PENDING state for 5 days — this is likely because external contributor PRs require approval to run CI workflows. Vercel deploy failures are expected (authorization required for external PRs). A maintainer should trigger the CI jobs or merge based on local verification. The code change is minimal and low-risk.
